argumenta

Binds command-line arguments for an entry point.

Syntax: incipit argumenta | functio () argumenta

Category

entry

Related

  • incipit
  • cli
  • imperium
  • optio
  • operandus

Examples

examples/corpus/argumenta/argumenta.fab (canonical · keyword)

Binds command-line arguments for an entry point.

# argumenta — CLI entry operand binding
#
# GRAMMAR:
#   entryDecl :← 'incipit' 'argumenta' ident block
#
# EXPECTED OUTPUT:
#   No incipit — declaration or test-runner surface only.
#
# BACKEND:
#   declaration-only CLI entry (whitelist: argumenta/argumenta.fab).
#

@ cli "argumenta-smoke"
@ descriptio "argumenta exemplum"
incipit argumenta args {
}
Sources
  • ["examples/corpus/argumenta/argumenta.fab"]
